_doc: 1. EXACT  — key is a literal req.path (case-insensitive match), value is a string:
2. PARAMETRIC — key/value contain the {lang} token; the loader auto-expands
to six entries, one per supported language (es, en, fr, de, pt, ca):
3. REGEX — value is an object with `pattern` (RegExp source) and
Edit safely — non-engineers may add rows here. Keep keys lowercase (matching
is case-insensitive) and start every path with a leading slash. Keys
starting with underscore (_doc, _notes, ...) are ignored by the loader.
